intended_use: BioticsAI is intended to analyze fetal ultrasound images and frames (DICOM instances) using machine learning techniques to automatically detect views, detect anatomical structures within the views and
intended_use_full: BioticsAI is intended to analyze fetal ultrasound images and frames (DICOM instances) using machine learning techniques to automatically detect views, detect anatomical structures within the views and to facilitate quality criteria verification and characteristics of the views. The device is intended for use by Healthcare Professionals as a concurrent reading aid during and after the acquisition and interpretation of fetal ultrasound images.
target_condition: Fetal anatomy assessment during mid-trimester ultrasound screening
ground_truth: Manual annotation/expert review of fetal ultrasound images (reference standard not explicitly detailed)
other_metrics: Per-class top-1 plane classification sensitivity ranges from 0.897 (face_orbits_lenses) to 1.000 (face_median_facial_profile); specificity ranges from 0.992 to 1.000 across 13 fetal planes. Sensitivity and specificity reported for 5 high-level anatomy sections and 48 individual anatomical structures with 95% bootstrapping confidence intervals.
